title: Thief returns stolen equip when invalidated

card.rawText: When summoned, steal 1 equip card from your opponent's side of the field and equip it to this card. Send the stolen card to its original owner's cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Thief returns stolen equip when invalidated
plan.summary: If Thief leaves, changes control, or the effect is negated, verify the stolen equip goes to original owner cemetery.

notes: Place Thief with a stolen linked equip card.

When summoned, steal 1 equip card from your opponent's side of the field and equip it to this card. Send the stolen card to its original owner's cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

steps: Send linked stolen equip to original owner cemetery.
